summary: VELA Iteration 4 (Reliability refactor) tested end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 regression + 4/4 fallback-helper unit tests + 8/8 transform regression all pass (31/32 incl. 1 intentional skip). Live /api/properties/{id}/analyze now returns the lightweight schema exactly as specced — summary, 8 metrics, score_breakdown (6 axes weights 25/20/15/15/15/10 summing to 100), 12-month performance_overview, exactly 5 yield_opportunities, market_intelligence{adr_range,pricing_gap,premium_potential}, action_plan.quick_wins (exactly 3) with NO design_intelligence/layout_intelligence/medium_upgrades/high_roi_renovations and NO _id leakage. Internal numeric consistency check (annual_revenue ≈ ADR×365×occ%) holds within 5%. Demo /api/properties/demo unchanged — still rich (10-key design_intelligence, layout_intelligence, all 3 action_plan tabs, 6-axis score_breakdown, 12-month curve). _compute_fallback_analysis() exercised directly via python: produces a complete light schema without crashing on missing inputs, and _enrich_analysis() correctly attaches the 6-axis score_breakdown (preserving existing AI breakdowns) and the 12-month seasonal curve. Frontend: /analyze submits cleanly with min inputs, runs the 4 cinematic stages exactly as specced ('Reading property data…', 'Evaluating yield potential…', 'Scoring layout efficiency…', 'Generating asset intelligence…'), navigates to /dashboard/{id}, dashboard renders with no console errors despite missing design_intelligence/layout_intelligence/medium_upgrades/high_roi_renovations (action plan tab bar correctly filters to 'Quick Wins' only). Submit button label is 'Generate Analysis'. Demo dashboard regression OK (all 3 action plan tabs, design+layout intel sections, Transformation Engine all visible). Error/retry path verified via Playwright route interception: first /analyze returns 502 → analysis-error + retry-btn render, click Retry reuses pendingId (POST /properties stays at 1, second /analyze fires) and navigates to /dashboard. Fallback badge path was not directly observable since live AI succeeded each time — but the helper test confirms is_fallback=True is set deterministically when run_ai_analysis returns None.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 970 lines (up from ~880). The reliability refactor cleanly splits AI call (_ai_analysis_call), fallback (_compute_fallback_analysis), enrichment (_enrich_analysis) and orchestration (run_ai_analysis + analyze_property) — well-factored. Recommend (carry-over) splitting DEMO_PROPERTY/DEMO_ANALYSIS into /app/backend/seed/demo.py and TRANSFORM_DIRECTIVES into /app/backend/transform/directives.py.

run_ai_analysis catches a broad Exception which is correct for the reliability goal — every AI failure (key missing, import error, ChatError, JSON parse failure, network) ends up in the fallback path. analyze_property no longer raises 5xx for AI failures (good).
_enrich_analysis is idempotent with respect to score_breakdown (only sets if missing) and respects existing performance_overview.monthly_revenue from AI — correct design.

Internal numeric consistency rule (annual_revenue ≈ ADR×365×occ/100) is enforced softly via the prompt; the live AI returned values within 5% in the test run. The fallback path computes it exactly, so it's safe under degradation.
Frontend Analyze.runFlow correctly preserves pendingId across retries — verified by Playwright (POST /properties count remained 1 after a 502 → retry → success cycle).
Dashboard.availableTabs filters action_plan tabs to only the populated ones — verified visually (only 'Quick Wins' shown for live /analyze, all 3 tabs shown for /demo).

fallback-badge ([data-testid="fallback-badge"]) is rendered conditionally on a.is_fallback — code path inspected; not exercised live (AI was up). The toast 'Preliminary analysis ready — full intelligence will refresh shortly.' fires from the same condition.
No MongoDB ObjectId leakage detected on any endpoint touched.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_vela_backend.py (test_analyze rewritten for the lightweight Iteration 4 schema)

success_rate.backend: 100% (31/32 — 19 regression + 4 fallback unit + 8 transform; 1 intentional skip on env-swap test that cannot affect supervisor process)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Analyze form, 4 stages, navigation, demo regression, error+retry+pendingId-reuse all PASS; fallback badge not exercisable via UI because live AI was up)

test_credentials: MongoDB test_database session inserted via conftest._create_session(). UI test session: ui_session_1778225496268 (user_id ui-iter4-...).
seed_data_creation: TEST_VELA_Suite + TEST_VELA_Fallback + TEST_Iter4_UI + TEST_Iter4_RetryFlow properties + 2 PNG uploads created by regression suite. All TEST_-prefixed for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run order: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_vela_backend.py /app/backend/tests/test_iter4_fallback.py -v (~50s, 1 live AI call). For full suite incl. transform regression: also run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_transform.py -v (~2.5 min, 5 live Claude calls). To verify the fallback badge path in the UI, monkeypatch the supervisor backend's EMERGENT_LLM_KEY='' (edit /app/backend/.env temporarily) and rerun /analyze — analysis.is_fallback will be True and the [data-testid="fallback-badge"] will render under the summary along with the 'Preliminary analysis ready' sonner toast.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration. All Iteration 4 acceptance criteria validated.
